summary.zh: 记忆时间线会按逻辑日正确归档，日记忆不再把跨天对话混进错误日期。
summary.en: Memory timeline entries now attach to the correct logical day, so daily summaries stop mixing cross-day conversations into the wrong date.

title.zh: 记忆时间线按逻辑日归档

summary.zh: 修复记忆编译时 timeline 条目归属错误的问题，跨天 session 的摘要不会再污染相邻日期的日记忆。
summary.en: Fixes timeline assignment during memory compilation so cross-day session summaries no longer bleed into neighboring daily memory entries.

sources.title: fix: assign memory timeline entries by logical day
